narrative:
Tallmadge 3-C (precinct in Summit County) has 1,016 registered voters, with 52.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 25.1%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.8 percentage points.
